Cell.Data: Full country catalog mapping used by the app.
The API only returns the year. We store that value locally and derive display dates.
apiFootballId, nameEn, nameHe, logoUrl, type, countryEn, countryHe
CompetitionSeason now also keeps the season-specific payload in JSON.
This is an internal job step, not a separate API-Football service.
team.id, team.name, team.code, team.country, team.founded, team.logo
apiFootballId, nameEn, nameHe, code, countryEn, countryHe, founded, logoUrl
Core team identity is saved. Logo may be replaced by a locally stored copy.
Team rows keep a venue reference plus denormalized venue and city labels.
coach/coaches via lineup sync, plus full team+venue payload in additionalInfo
Team rows now also keep the full source payload locally in JSON.
id, name, address, city, country, capacity, surface, image
apiFootballId, nameEn, nameHe, addressEn, addressHe, cityEn, cityHe, countryEn, countryHe, capacity, surface, imageUrl
Venue catalog is mapped well from both team and fixture payloads.
apiFootballId, nameEn, nameHe, photoUrl, jerseyNumber, position, teamId, canonicalPlayerId
Only the subset needed for roster identity is written today.
These identity fields are now populated during player sync.
player.birth.date, player.birth.place, player.birth.country, player.nationality, player.age, player.height, player.weight, player.injured
birthDate, birthPlaceEn/He, birthCountryEn/He, nationalityEn/He, age, height, weight, isInjured, additionalInfo
Richer player profile data is now persisted locally.
fixture.id, fixture.date, fixture.referee, fixture.venue.name, league.round, goals.home, goals.away, fixture.status.short
apiFootballId, externalRef, dateTime, refereeEn, refereeHe, refereeId, venueNameEn, venueNameHe, venueId, roundNameEn, roundNameHe, homeScore, awayScore, status
Core fixture state is mapped to Game.
fixture.timestamp, timezone, periods, status.long, status.elapsed, score breakdown
timestamp, timezone, statusShort, statusLong, elapsed, extra, additionalInfo
Detailed fixture state is now stored directly plus the full fixture payload in JSON.
Referees are normalized into a separate catalog.
rank, all.played, all.win, all.draw, all.lose, all.goals.for, all.goals.against, points, form
position, played, wins, draws, losses, goalsFor, goalsAgainst, points, form, teamId, seasonId, competitionId
Primary table standings are saved correctly.
goalsDiff, group, description, status, promotion/relegation metadata, deductions
Richer standing metadata is now stored, with the full row payload preserved in JSON.
time.elapsed, time.extra, type, detail, team.name, player.name, assist.name
minute, extraMinute, type, notesEn, notesHe, icon, team, teamId, playerId, relatedPlayerId, gameId
Assist names are linked through relatedPlayerId. Event rows are fully rebuilt per fixture refresh.
Ball Possession, Shots on Goal, Total Shots, Corner Kicks, Fouls, Offsides, Yellow Cards, Red Cards
home/away possession, shotsOnTarget, shotsTotal, corners, fouls, offsides, yellowCards, redCards
Core stats remain mapped to columns, and the full payload is now preserved in JSON.
other stat types such as shots off goal, blocked shots, goalkeeper saves, passes, pass accuracy, xG if present
Variable statistic types are now available locally in JSON even when not exposed as dedicated columns.
apiFootballId, role, participantType, participantName, formation, positionName, positionGrid, jerseyNumber, gameId, teamId, playerId
Both starters and substitutes are kept, plus a coach row per team.
apiFootballCoachId, coachNameEn, coachNameHe, startDate, endDate, teamId, seasonId
Coach assignments are derived from lineup snapshots over time.
category, rank, value, gamesPlayed, teamId, playerId, apiFootballPlayerId, playerNameEn, playerNameHe, teamNameEn, teamNameHe
Only the leaderboard value and appearance count are stored.
extra scoring detail fields from statistics block
Extra leaderboard detail now stays available locally in JSON.
category, rank, value, gamesPlayed, teamId, playerId, apiFootballPlayerId, playerNameEn, playerNameHe, teamNameEn, teamNameHe
Same shape as top scorers, but value holds assists.
fixture.id, fixture.date, team.id, team.name, player.id, player.name, player.type, player.reason

apiFootballPlayerId, apiFootballTeamId, apiFootballFixtureId, playerNameEn, playerNameHe, teamNameEn, teamNameHe, typeEn, typeHe, reasonEn, reasonHe, fixtureDate, seasonId, competitionId, teamId, playerId, gameId
Injury rows are deleted and rebuilt for the selected scope.
player.id, player.name, transfers[].date, transfers[].type, transfers[].teams.out.*, transfers[].teams.in.*, update

apiFootballPlayerId, playerNameEn, playerNameHe, transferDate, transferTypeEn, transferTypeHe, sourceTeamApiFootballId, sourceTeamNameEn, sourceTeamNameHe, sourceTeamLogoUrl, destinationTeamApiFootballId, destinationTeamNameEn, destinationTeamNameHe, destinationTeamLogoUrl, sourceUpdatedAt, seasonId, playerId
Only transfers whose date overlaps the selected season are kept.
apiFootballPlayerId, playerNameEn, playerNameHe, leagueNameEn, leagueNameHe, countryEn, countryHe, seasonLabel, placeEn, placeHe, seasonId, playerId
Only trophies matching the selected season label are saved.
apiFootballPlayerId, playerNameEn, playerNameHe, typeEn, typeHe, startDate, endDate, seasonId, playerId
Entries are filtered to season overlap and deduplicated per player/type/startDate.
predictions.winner, predictions.advice, predictions.win_or_draw, predictions.under_over, predictions.goals, predictions.percent, comparison

winnerTeamApiFootballId, winnerTeamNameEn, winnerTeamNameHe, winnerCommentEn, winnerCommentHe, adviceEn, adviceHe, winOrDraw, underOver, goalsHome, goalsAway, percentHome, percentDraw, percentAway, comparisonJson, rawJson
Prediction summary is stored plus rawJson for future expansion.
same core fields as GamePrediction plus snapshotAt
Historical prediction snapshots are also kept.
fixture.id, league.id, league.name, league.round, fixture.date, teams.home.*, teams.away.*, goals.*, winner

apiFootballFixtureId, relatedCompetitionApiId, relatedCompetitionNameEn, relatedCompetitionNameHe, relatedRoundEn, relatedRoundHe, relatedDate, homeTeamApiFootballId, homeTeamNameEn, homeTeamNameHe, awayTeamApiFootballId, awayTeamNameEn, awayTeamNameHe, homeScore, awayScore, winnerTeamApiFootballId, rawJson
This resource already keeps rawJson, so expansion here is low risk.
bookmakers[].id, bookmakers[].name, bets[].id, bets[].name, values[].value, values[].odd, update
bookmakerApiId, bookmakerName, marketApiId, marketName, selectionValue, odd, oddsUpdatedAt, bookmakerId, betId, gameId, seasonId, competitionId
Odds are normalized into current values plus historical snapshots.
Bet markets are normalized for reuse.
fixture.id, league.*, fixture.status.*, fixture.date, teams.*, goals.*, events count

apiFootballFixtureId, feedScope, leagueApiFootballId, leagueNameEn, leagueNameHe, roundEn, roundHe, statusShort, statusLong, elapsed, extra, snapshotAt, fixtureDate, homeTeamApiFootballId, homeTeamNameEn, homeTeamNameHe, awayTeamApiFootballId, awayTeamNameEn, awayTeamNameHe, homeScore, awayScore, eventCount, rawJson, gameId, seasonId, competitionId
Local live feed stores both summary fields and rawJson.
same live fixture payload used for homepage feed
same fields as livescore with feedScope=GLOBAL_HOMEPAGE
Global homepage live feed shares the same model.
local derivation from standings + events + lineups + statistics + fixtures
goals, assists, yellowCards, redCards, gamesPlayed, minutesPlayed, starts, substituteAppearances, timesSubbedOff
Player seasonal statistics are computed locally, not taken directly from the player API payload.
local derivation from standings + events + lineups + statistics + fixtures
matchesPlayed, totalGoals, totalAssists, goalsConceded, cleanSheets, yellowCards, redCards, shotsOnTarget, shotsTotal, corners, fouls, offsides, averagePossession, wins, draws, losses, points
Team seasonal statistics are also derived locally.
